contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: Oracle reading permalinks — credential source links now reproduce the full reading (hexagram + QMDJ)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/oracle/pull/27
  
  Details:
  Fixed the broken view-source experience on truesight-grounding credentials: clicking the source link on a practice event landed on a blank oracle.truesight.me because the recorded Source URL was the bare page URL while the reading lived only in the caster's localStorage. The practice-event submitter now records a reproducing permalink (?reading=<six line sums>&cast=<ISO timestamp>) — the signature restores the hexagrams and the cast param restores the instant the QMDJ chart derives from; the page-side parser honors cast so restored readings chart the original moment rather than the restore time, and the manual share button carries it too. Also fixed a latent auto-submit bug discovered en route: any visitor opening a shared reading link with a keypair would have a practice event auto-recorded for a reading they merely viewed — restored readings are now marked sharedFromUrl and the auto-submitter skips them (manual Record still available). Verified permalink/parser round-trip; existing signed events keep their historical URLs, all new sessions get permalinks. PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/oracle/pull/27
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 75.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
